examples.name: Show ip dhcp snooping binding output with command echo and one binding
examples.input:
show ip dhcp snooping binding
MacAddress          IpAddress        Lease(sec)  Type           VLAN  Interface
------------------  ---------------  ----------  -------------  ----  --------------------
00:11:01:00:00:01   100.100.0.3      1128        dhcp-snooping   100   FiftyGigE6/0/25
Total number of bindings: 1
